errors.meaning: Job ran and detected an openclaw update (2026.3.13 → 2026.3.22) but failed to post to #infrastructure — channel not found.
errors.suggestedFix: Fix the delivery target in infra-version-check job config — update channel to a valid channel ID (e.g. C0ANLFZD1TJ).

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl summary ran successfully and generated output but failed to deliver — delivery target format is invalid (channel name used instead of channel ID).
errors.suggestedFix: Update toggl-weekly-summary delivery target from 'channel:c0amwt9jb5y' to 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' (correct casing) or verify the channel ID is correct.
